title: A Country Where People Can Kill Others
overview: Kino and Hermes meet a young man on their travels. He planned to move to the country that lay up ahead, but according to him, murder isn't prohibited by law there, and a vicious criminal has escaped to that land.

title: Colosseum
overview: Kino arrived at a country where Kino has wanted to visit. Kino heard that there is a wonderful country, but everything has changed by the present king. He forces travelers to struggle for life or death battle to make a show.

title: Bothersome Country
overview: When Kino take a short rest, the ground is moving, and then huge castle wall appears. Kino and Hermes are astonished to see "Moving country" for the first time.

title: Ship Country
overview: Shizu and Riku board an ultra large ship called "Ship Country" that trades with other continents. Shizu and Riku get to know a girl named Ti who is a guide chosen by the leader.

title: Country of Liars
overview: Kino and Hermes encounter a man waiting for his lover to return and a woman who takes care of him in a country.

title: In the Clouds
overview: A family of peddler makes camp for the night at an open space in high mountains. There is a girl as a slave who works silently with them.

title: Historic Country
overview: Kino heard that there is a large and magnificent clocktower in the country where they are going next, then Kino was remained of a story of her master's past.

title: Country of Radio Waves
overview: Shizu, Riku and Ti get to a country where is stable in politics and economy, people are very kind and accepting immigrants. However, they come to know the country has a long-standing problem.

title: Various Countries
overview: This is a collection of short stories with author's note.

title: Kind Country
overview: A beautiful country has a bad reputation that stir up Kino's interest. When Kino and Hermes get to the country surrounded some mountains, they get a warm welcome from the citizens unexpectedly.

title: Country of Adults
overview: A girl spends the last week before her 12th birthday when she comes of age in her country. She gets acquainted with a male traveler named Kino. She hears that he takes a journey as he like.

title: Fields of Sheep
overview: Kino and Hermes encounter a ferocious flock of sheep at a vast plain when Kino is riding her motorcycle Hermes unhurriedly.
